title: Deyeuxia korotkyi

The species Deyeuxia korotkyi is further classified within the tribe Poeae. Its classification also falls under the subfamily Pooideae. intro: Deyeuxia korotkyi, also known as Korotky's grass or Chinese fescue, is a species of grass native to China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, boasting various health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Deyeuxia korotkyi include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Deyeuxia korotkyi is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs to create herbal decoctions and infusions.
